content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic reward mechanisms from Topic A's ICM-based autonomous agents can be repurposed to automatically curate high-value training data for self-supervised world models from Topic B, turning passive unsupervised data collection into active, autonomous model improvement that aligns with 2025's memory-augmented agent design trends. This creates an autonomous developmental cycle where the world model's growing predictive knowledge expands the agent's ability to recognize novel, informative data, which in turn further improves the world model.
